text: All comparables have been found in close proximity to the subject property and were selected to demonstrate the marketability of 3-unit multi-family properties of a similar location, GBA, and age that have been recently updated/renovated. Due to recent market trends the comparables have received a market time adjustment of 5.0% based on the sales statistics chart included in this report. Comparable #1 has been adjusted for its location, site size, and GBA. Comparable #2 has been adjusted for its sales concessions, site size, GBA, and lack of exterior parking. Comparable #3 has been adjusted for its location, site size, age, GBA, bathroom count, lack of a basement, lack of central AC, and lack of a fireplace.
